title: Goldfish Aquarium Requirements
description: What are the necessary conditions for keeping goldfish in an aquarium?
narrative: The user is planning to set up an aquarium for their goldfish and wants to know the essential parameters to consider, such as tank size, water quality, and fish density. Relevant documents should provide guidance on how to create a suitable environment for goldfish, including specific recommendations for tank size, filtration systems, and stocking levels.

title: Wireless Audio Quality
description: What factors affect the audio quality of wireless headphones?
narrative: I'm in the market for new wireless headphones and I want to understand what affects their audio quality. Relevant results should discuss the technical specifications, such as codec support, bitrate, and frequency response, that impact the sound fidelity of wireless headphones. I'm also interested in learning about any environmental or device-related factors that can degrade or improve the listening experience.

title: WW1 US Entry
description: What events led to the United States' entry into World War I?
narrative: The user is looking for information on the specific circumstances and motivations that drove the United States to enter World War I. Relevant documents should discuss the key events, diplomatic communications, or other factors that contributed to the US decision to participate in the war.

title: Declaratory Act Impact
description: What are the implications of the Declaratory Act on colonial relationships with Great Britain?
narrative: A historian studying the American Revolution wants to understand the significance of the Declaratory Act and its effects on the relationship between the Thirteen Colonies and Great Britain. Relevant documents should discuss the Act's provisions, its comparison to the Irish Declaratory Act, and its influence on colonial politics and policies.

title: Pelvic Pain Causes
description: What are the underlying causes of chronic pelvic pain in women?
narrative: A woman experiencing persistent and unexplained pelvic pain is seeking information on potential causes. Relevant results should discuss specific medical conditions, such as endometriosis or adhesions, that may contribute to chronic pelvic pain. The focus is on identifying possible underlying factors rather than treatments or symptoms.

title: Social Health Factors
description: What are the key social and economic factors that influence health outcomes?
narrative: The user is looking for information on how societal organization and distribution of resources impact health. Relevant documents should discuss specific policies or interventions related to economic and social determinants of health, such as education, employment, housing, and access to healthcare. Documents that only provide general information on health outcomes or mental health concepts without addressing the social and economic context are not relevant.

title: Diabetes Infection Risks
description: What are the unique infection risks associated with diabetes, and how can they be prevented or treated?
narrative: The user is looking for information on the specific types of infections that people with diabetes are more susceptible to, such as unusual organisms or opportunistic infections. Relevant documents should discuss the increased risk of these infections in individuals with diabetes, as well as prevention and treatment strategies, such as immunizations or antibiotics. Documents that simply list general complications of diabetes without addressing infection risks specifically are not relevant.

title: Climate Variation
description: How does climate vary by geographic location and time of year?
narrative: A user planning a trip wants to know how temperature, humidity, and other climate factors change across different regions and throughout the year. Relevant documents should provide information on climate patterns, including seasonal variations and differences in temperature and humidity at various altitudes and latitudes.

title: Pseudobulbar Palsy Symptoms
description: What are the common symptoms and signs of pseudobulbar palsy?
narrative: A doctor wants to understand the typical presentation of pseudobulbar palsy in patients. Relevant documents should describe the characteristic symptoms, such as speech difficulties, swallowing problems, or facial weakness, and how they manifest in individuals with this condition. Documents that only mention pseudobulbar palsy in passing or as a differential diagnosis are not relevant.

title: Expert Witness Testimony
description: What are the criteria for evaluating the credibility of expert witnesses in court cases?
narrative: A legal researcher needs to understand the factors that determine the admissibility and reliability of expert witness testimony in court proceedings. Relevant documents should discuss the qualifications, experience, and methodologies of expert witnesses, as well as any standards or guidelines governing their testimony.

title: Vintage Camera Restoration
description: What are the best practices for restoring a vintage camera to working condition?
narrative: A photography enthusiast is looking to restore their grandfather's old film camera to its original state. They want to know the steps involved in cleaning, repairing, and maintaining the camera's mechanical components, as well as any tips for preserving the camera's aesthetic value. Relevant documents should provide detailed guidance on the restoration process, including troubleshooting common issues and recommending specialized tools or materials.

title: Egg Laying Patterns
description: What factors influence the frequency and quantity of eggs laid by chickens?
narrative: The user is seeking information on the variables that affect egg laying patterns in chickens, such as breed, health, nutrition, and environmental conditions. Relevant documents should provide insights into these factors and their impact on egg production. Documents that simply state the number of eggs laid without providing context or explanations are not relevant.

title: Soil Erosion Control
description: What methods can be used to prevent soil erosion on sloped land?
narrative: The user is looking for techniques to prevent soil erosion on sloped land, such as terracing or increasing vegetation. Relevant documents should provide information on the effectiveness of these methods and any potential drawbacks or limitations.

title: Humanitarian Aid
description: What organizations provide disaster relief services in the United States?
narrative: The user is looking for information on organizations that offer disaster relief services within the US. Relevant documents should mention specific organizations, their roles, and the types of disasters they respond to. The user is not interested in general information about disaster preparedness or international aid efforts.

title: Metamorphic Rock Formation
description: What are the conditions and processes involved in the formation of metamorphic rocks during mountain building?
narrative: The user is looking for information on the geological processes that lead to the formation of metamorphic rocks, specifically in the context of mountain building. Relevant documents should describe the types of metamorphism associated with convergent plate boundaries, the role of temperature and pressure, and the differences between various types of metamorphism.

title: Mortgage Credit Score
description: What are the implications of having a high or low credit score when applying for a mortgage?
narrative: The user is planning to apply for a mortgage and wants to understand how their credit score will impact the interest rate they qualify for. Relevant documents should explain the relationship between credit scores and mortgage interest rates, including any specific score thresholds that lenders use to determine interest rates.

title: Ventilator Chest Tube Management
description: What are the considerations for managing chest tubes in patients on mechanical ventilation?

title: Trapezoid Properties
description: What are the characteristics of a scalene trapezoid?
narrative: The user is looking for information about the properties and features of a specific type of trapezoid, namely a scalene trapezoid. Documents that only mention trapezoids in general or other types of quadrilaterals are not relevant.

title: Financial Regulations
description: What are the current regulations and laws governing financial analysis and transactions in India?
narrative: The user is looking for information on the current regulatory framework in India that governs financial analysis, transactions, and institutions. Relevant documents should discuss laws, rules, and guidelines issued by authorities such as the Reserve Bank of India (RBI) or other relevant agencies. The user is interested in understanding the specific provisions and requirements related to Anti-Money Laundering (AML), Countering Terrorist Financing (CTF), and financial analysis.

title: Cultural Influences
description: What are the ways in which cultural traditions and practices influence daily life around the world?
narrative: The user is looking for information on how different cultural practices and traditions shape people's daily lives, beyond just their country of origin. Relevant documents should provide specific examples or insights into the impact of cultural influences on various aspects of life, such as food, customs, or social norms.

title: Aviation Weather Resources
description: What are the best online resources for finding weather forecasts and severe storm alerts relevant to aviation?
narrative: The user is looking for websites or web pages that provide reliable and up-to-date weather information, including forecasts, radar maps, and severe storm alerts, specifically geared towards pilots, airlines, or other aviation professionals. description: What are the costs associated with adding radiant flooring to a concrete foundation?

description: What are popular foods in different regions or countries?
narrative: A user wants to know about well-known or staple foods in various parts of the world. narrative: The user is looking for information on the physiological and behavioral adaptations that allow dolphins to conserve heat in cold aquatic environments. description: What criteria does Medicare use to determine if someone is homebound?
narrative: A user wants to understand the specific conditions under which Medicare considers someone homebound, in order to determine their eligibility for related benefits. Relevant documents should clearly outline the criteria used by Medicare to make this determination.

narrative: The user is looking for information on how DNA sequences are translated into protein sequences, specifically the mechanisms and processes involved in encoding amino acid residues. description: What is the physiological mechanism behind pain sensation in the parietal pleura?
narrative: The user is looking for documents that explain how pain is perceived and transmitted in the parietal pleura, specifically the underlying biological processes. Relevant documents should provide information on the innervation of the parietal pleura, the types of nerve fibers involved, and any other factors that contribute to pain sensation in this area.

title: Plant Water Transport
description: How do plants transport water from roots to leaves?
narrative: The user is looking for information on the process by which plants move water from their roots to their leaves. title: Heart Failure Causes
description: What are the underlying causes and risk factors for left-sided heart failure?
narrative: The user is looking for information on the root causes and contributing factors that lead to left-sided heart failure, as well as any relevant medical research or studies. description: How should I determine my budget for landscaping projects?
narrative: The user is planning to hire a landscape professional and needs guidance on how to set a realistic budget. description: What are the most effective treatments for herpes outbreaks and how can they be managed?
